memories.value: Will build user behavior pattern library from usage analytics and feedback across first 3 runs. Track journey stages, drop-off points, and feature adoption rates.
Will establish pain point registry from support tickets and user feedback. Score by frequency x severity x user segment size. Re-rank every run.
Will maintain a prioritized list of UX research questions that need deeper investigation. Add items when patterns are ambiguous or evidence is insufficient.
First run. Query user_feedback and support_tickets to discover initial pain point themes. Read usage_analytics to identify drop-off points. Begin clustering signals by journey stage.
